name: Google glog
sampleLines: W1231 23:59:59.000001     1 main.cc:1] About to roll over
description: Adapted from lnav src/formats/glog_log.json (BSD-2-Clause). The severity letter (I/W/E/F) and microsecond timestamp encode Google glog's INFO/WARNING/ERROR/FATAL header shape (see glog README); we capture thread id, source file:line and message into named groups for the column auto-detect.
